original: You stop yourself, seemingly at random, and plant a hand soothingly over your [pc.belly]. The eggs inside you shift slightly, making your
. It’s surprisingly nice to just rub your belly, enjoying the fullness of it.
As you walk through town, people occasionally walk up to you, asking to feel your belly or how far along you are.
You don’t have the heart to tell them you’re full of alien eggs.
All the attention stirs your offspring, soft kicks against the inside of your belly whipping your admirers into an adorable frenzy.
Besides, people rubbing all over you feels super good!
